title: City Council Special Meeting and Work Session

sections.label: 1. Call the special meeting to order. 7:00 P.M., Work Session Room 111.
2. Consideration of a resolution to endorse the City’s application to the Transportation Planning Board’s Regional Roadway Safety Program.
3. Consideration of a resolution endorsing an application to the Virginia Department of Rail and Public Transportation’s Transit Ridership Incentive Program.
4. Consideration of a resolution to adopt the Affordable Housing Strategic Plan.
5. Recess the special meeting to go into a work session.
a. Discussion on the development of the Green Building Policy.
b. Introduction of draft Small Area Plan Zoning Ordinance Amendments.
c. Discussion of Alternative Delivery Methods for Construction.
